name: Valentine's Day Small Giftable Heart Grid Pillow - Spritz™
description:
Add a touch of charm to your space with the Valentine's Day Small Giftable Heart Grid Pillow by Spritz™. Crafted from polyester, this decorative accent is perfect for adding a festive feel to your tabletop. Its multicolored design and compact size make it an ideal gift or a delightful addition to your seasonal decor. Celebrate love and warmth with this cozy and colorful piece.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
